# terrible_community_general_keycloak_realm (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `access_code_lifespan` (Number) The realm access code lifespan.
- `access_code_lifespan_login` (Number) The realm access code lifespan login.
- `access_code_lifespan_user_action` (Number) The realm access code lifespan user action.
- `access_token_lifespan` (Number) The realm access token lifespan.
- `access_token_lifespan_for_implicit_flow` (Number) The realm access token lifespan for implicit flow.
- `account_theme` (String) The realm account theme.
- `action_token_generated_by_admin_lifespan` (Number) The realm action token generated by admin lifespan.
- `action_token_generated_by_user_lifespan` (Number) The realm action token generated by user lifespan.
- `admin_events_details_enabled` (Boolean) The realm admin events details enabled.
- `admin_events_enabled` (Boolean) The realm admin events enabled.
- `admin_permissions_enabled` (Boolean) The realm admin permissions enabled.
- `admin_theme` (String) The realm admin theme.
- `attributes` (String) The realm attributes.
- `browser_flow` (String) The realm browser flow.
- `browser_security_headers` (String) The realm browser security headers.
- `brute_force_protected` (Boolean) The realm brute force protected.
- `brute_force_strategy` (String) The realm brute force strategy.
- `client_authentication_flow` (String) The realm client authentication flow.
- `client_offline_session_idle_timeout` (Number) All Clients inherit from this setting, time an offline session is allowed to be idle before it expires.
- `client_offline_session_max_lifespan` (Number) All Clients inherit from this setting, max time before an offline session is expired regardless of activity.
- `client_scope_mappings` (String) The realm client scope mappings.
- `client_session_idle_timeout` (Number) All Clients inherit from this setting, time a session is allowed to be idle before it expires.
- `client_session_max_lifespan` (Number) All Clients inherit from this setting, max time before a session is expired.
- `default_default_client_scopes` (String) The realm default default client scopes.
- `default_groups` (String) The realm default groups.
- `default_locale` (String) The realm default locale.
- `default_optional_client_scopes` (String) The realm default optional client scopes.
- `default_roles` (String) The realm default roles.
- `default_signature_algorithm` (String) The realm default signature algorithm.
- `direct_grant_flow` (String) The realm direct grant flow.
- `display_name` (String) The realm display name.
- `display_name_html` (String) The realm display name HTML.
- `docker_authentication_flow` (String) The realm docker authentication flow.
- `duplicate_emails_allowed` (Boolean) The realm duplicate emails allowed option.
- `edit_username_allowed` (Boolean) The realm edit username allowed option.
- `email_theme` (String) The realm email theme.
- `enabled` (Boolean) The realm enabled option.
- `enabled_event_types` (String) The realm enabled event types.
- `events_enabled` (Boolean) Enables or disables login events for this realm.
- `events_expiration` (Number) The realm events expiration.
- `events_listeners` (String) The realm events listeners.
- `failure_factor` (Number) The realm failure factor.
- `id` (String) The realm to create.
- `internationalization_enabled` (Boolean) The realm internationalization enabled option.
- `login_theme` (String) The realm login theme.
- `login_with_email_allowed` (Boolean) The realm login with email allowed option.
- `max_delta_time_seconds` (Number) The realm max delta time in seconds.
- `max_failure_wait_seconds` (Number) The realm max failure wait in seconds.
- `max_temporary_lockouts` (Number) The realm max temporary lockouts.
- `minimum_quick_login_wait_seconds` (Number) The realm minimum quick login wait in seconds.
- `not_before` (Number) The realm not before.
- `oauth2_device_code_lifespan` (Number) Max time before the device code and user code are expired.
- `oauth2_device_polling_interval` (Number) The minimum amount of time in seconds that the client should wait between polling requests to the token endpoint.
- `offline_session_idle_timeout` (Number) The realm offline session idle timeout.
- `offline_session_max_lifespan` (Number) The realm offline session max lifespan.
- `offline_session_max_lifespan_enabled` (Boolean) The realm offline session max lifespan enabled option.
- `organizations_enabled` (Boolean) Enables support for experimental organization feature.
- `otp_policy_algorithm` (String) The realm otp policy algorithm.
- `otp_policy_digits` (Number) The realm otp policy digits.
- `otp_policy_initial_counter` (Number) The realm otp policy initial counter.
- `otp_policy_look_ahead_window` (Number) The realm otp policy look ahead window.
- `otp_policy_period` (Number) The realm otp policy period.
- `otp_policy_type` (String) The realm otp policy type.
- `otp_supported_applications` (String) The realm otp supported applications.
- `password_policy` (String) The realm password policy.
- `permanent_lockout` (Boolean) The realm permanent lockout.
- `quick_login_check_milli_seconds` (Number) The realm quick login check in milliseconds.
- `realm` (String) The realm name.
- `refresh_token_max_reuse` (Number) The realm refresh token max reuse.
- `registration_allowed` (Boolean) The realm registration allowed option.
- `registration_email_as_username` (Boolean) The realm registration email as username option.
- `registration_flow` (String) The realm registration flow.
- `remember_me` (Boolean) The realm remember me option.
- `reset_credentials_flow` (String) The realm reset credentials flow.
- `reset_password_allowed` (Boolean) The realm reset password allowed option.
- `revoke_refresh_token` (Boolean) The realm revoke refresh token option.
- `smtp_server` (String) The realm smtp server.
- `ssl_required` (String) The realm ssl required option.
- `sso_session_idle_timeout` (Number) The realm sso session idle timeout.
- `sso_session_idle_timeout_remember_me` (Number) The realm sso session idle timeout remember me.
- `sso_session_max_lifespan` (Number) The realm sso session max lifespan.
- `sso_session_max_lifespan_remember_me` (Number) The realm sso session max lifespan remember me.
- `state` (String) State of the realm. On `present`, the realm is created (or updated if it exists already). On `absent`, the realm is removed if it exists.
- `supported_locales` (String) The realm supported locales.
- `user_managed_access_allowed` (Boolean) The realm user managed access allowed option.
- `verify_email` (Boolean) The realm verify email option.
- `wait_increment_seconds` (Number) The realm wait increment in seconds.
- `web_authn_policy_acceptable_aaguids` (String) List of acceptable AAGUIDs for WebAuthn authenticators.
- `web_authn_policy_attestation_conveyance_preference` (String) Attestation conveyance preference for WebAuthn.
- `web_authn_policy_authenticator_attachment` (String) Authenticator attachment preference for WebAuthn authenticators.
- `web_authn_policy_avoid_same_authenticator_register` (Boolean) Avoid registering the same authenticator multiple times.
- `web_authn_policy_create_timeout` (Number) Timeout for WebAuthn credential creation (ms).
- `web_authn_policy_extra_origins` (String) Additional acceptable origins for WebAuthn requests.
- `web_authn_policy_passwordless_acceptable_aaguids` (String) List of acceptable AAGUIDs for WebAuthn passwordless authenticators.
- `web_authn_policy_passwordless_attestation_conveyance_preference` (String) Attestation conveyance preference for WebAuthn passwordless.
- `web_authn_policy_passwordless_authenticator_attachment` (String) Authenticator attachment for WebAuthn passwordless.
- `web_authn_policy_passwordless_avoid_same_authenticator_register` (Boolean) Avoid registering the same authenticator multiple times for passwordless.
- `web_authn_policy_passwordless_create_timeout` (Number) Timeout for WebAuthn passwordless credential creation (ms).
- `web_authn_policy_passwordless_extra_origins` (String) Additional acceptable origins for WebAuthn passwordless requests.
- `web_authn_policy_passwordless_passkeys_enabled` (Boolean) Enable passkeys (conditional UI) authentication in the username forms.
- `web_authn_policy_passwordless_require_resident_key` (String) Whether resident keys are required for WebAuthn passwordless (`Yes`/`No`/`not specified`).
- `web_authn_policy_passwordless_rp_entity_name` (String) WebAuthn Passwordless Relying Party Entity Name.
- `web_authn_policy_passwordless_rp_id` (String) WebAuthn Passwordless Relying Party ID (domain).
- `web_authn_policy_passwordless_signature_algorithms` (String) List of acceptable WebAuthn signature algorithms for passwordless.
- `web_authn_policy_passwordless_user_verification_requirement` (String) User verification requirement for WebAuthn passwordless.
- `web_authn_policy_require_resident_key` (String) Whether resident keys are required for WebAuthn (Yes/No/not specified).
- `web_authn_policy_rp_entity_name` (String) WebAuthn Relying Party Entity Name.
- `web_authn_policy_rp_id` (String) WebAuthn Relying Party ID (domain). Empty string means use request host.
- `web_authn_policy_signature_algorithms` (String) List of acceptable WebAuthn signature algorithms.
- `web_authn_policy_user_verification_requirement` (String) User verification requirement for WebAuthn.

### Read-Only

- `end_state` (String) Representation of realm after module execution (sample is truncated).
- `existing` (String) Representation of existing realm (sample is truncated).
- `msg` (String) Message as to what action was taken.
- `proposed` (String) Representation of proposed realm.
